Pestilence Scythe [16/48]  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: 1
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 48
DMG: 16 Dmg Bonus: 162
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
SV DISEASE: +10 SV POISON: +10
Effect: Vampiric Curse (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 12.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR SHD NEC BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Pestilence Scythe [16/48]
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: 1
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 48
DMG: 16 Dmg Bonus: 162
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
SV DISEASE: +10 SV POISON: +10
Effect: Vampiric Curse (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 12.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR SHD NEC BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Slashing
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-18 20:51:36
Page Updated:Tue May 21st, 2024

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 30
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

South Karana
NPC Name
Lord Grimrot - live

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

North Karana
Quest Name
Aegis of Life

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
South Karana
There are two versions of this weapon. This is the stronger one. The weak one has a 10/50 ratio.


Uploaded November 17th, 2016 by boboniner
Updated December 21st, 2019
Send a correction

Just to clear up the confustion a bit-I killed the dead version the other night and the scythe that dropped was the same as the one pictured, not the one described above that. I know they say there are 2 versions, and that this is the weak one.

killed grimrot
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2002 at 6:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772048936
View User Forum
5 posts
ok just killed this guy with 50 druid
the picture is right for the non quest one alla's stats printed above are right as far as damage delay for the quest one but it is also 10 vs dis and poison and has effect vampiric curse i believe, not sure actually what the effect was called. I had some help finishing him off he resisted alot and I was on a corpse run at the time. He was light blue. I let some lucky cleric in zone loot it. It dropped off the live version.

# Aug 29 2001 at 12:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1671409140606
569 posts
Yes this is the wrong scythe picture. Lord Grimrot living version drops TWO scythes. The lesser one is the 10 damage one. The no drop can be used for the cleric and paladin quest.

# Mar 08 2001 at 12:21 PM Rating: Default

You should get the No Drop one from live version.
You get this Lore Scythe and a heart off the undead version, at least thats what I got.

QuoteReply
# Sep 21 2024 at 3:03 AM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
It is not Monk equippable. The 10/50 version is.
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
RE: 2HS????
QuoteReply
# Jan 30 2001 at 9:05 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
so, necro's can't use Slash weapons PERIOD
▲ Page top
RE: 2HS????
QuoteReply
# Sep 21 2024 at 3:07 AM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
If it's equippable, but you don't get 2HS skill, then it is usable as if your 2HS skill were 1, and it can't be increased. A necro attempting to use this would first make sure his pet was able to hold aggro, while attempting to get the scythe to proc. The proc is the only part about this scythe that makes it worthwhile for a necro.
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
RE: 2HS????
QuoteReply
# Sep 24 2002 at 7:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966266483
51 posts
Well, bards can't use 2hs, but it can still be equiped. Doesn't mean you'll be any good at it. Try it. They might have made it so you can't equip something you have no skill, but you never know. Example: Glowing Wooden Crook is 2hb, I decided to put it on my bard. No 2hb skill. It still worked. So, just because the class doesn't have the skill doesn't mean they can't equip it. If it says it, you can do it.
▲ Page top
RE: 2HS????
QuoteReply
# Sep 21 2024 at 3:09 AM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
You would only do that if you had a weapon that had an amazing proc, and someone else, or a pet, to hold the aggro. In all other cases, using it as if you had a weapon skill of 1, isn't worth it. You'd never hit anything.
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Feb 21 2001 at 10:14 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) IT STATES WARRIOR SHADOW NIGHT NECHRO ONLY NOT MONK AND ITS FOR A QUEST ANYWAYS MAINLY USED FOR CLERIC QUEST AEGIS OF LIFE A NICE +10 WIS MELEE OR BACK SLOT ITEM.
